name: Golem
bio: A towering golem fueled by raw fury, it crushes anything that stands in its path.

skills.name: Rock Smash
skills.description: Deal Physical Damage to opponent equal to 190% of Magic Power + 100.

skills.name: Earthquake
skills.description: Deal Magical Damage to opponent equal to 180% of Magic Power + 100.

skills.name: Shatter!
skills.description: Deal 550 Physical Damage, then permanently reduce the enemy's Armor and Magic Resist by 9%.

skills.name: Unbreaking Earth
skills.description: Heal for (8% of Magic Power + 8% of Attack Damage + 180).

ultimate.name: Obliteration
ultimate.description: Deal Physical Damage to opponent equal to (60% of Attack Damage + 1200).
